questionHtml: Determine whether it is possible to complete a journey that starts and finishes at different towns that also uses each of the roads exactly once. Give a reason for your answer.
markschemeHtml:
there are more than two vertices with odd degree           R1

so it is not possible to travel along each road exactly once           A1

 

Note: Do not award R0A1.

Award R1 for “There are 4 vertices with odd degree”.

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: Determine whether it is possible to complete a journey that starts and finishes at different towns that also uses each of the roads exactly once. Give a reason for your answer.
